title: coupon — field classification
description: Coupon data is a mix of commercial reference data (public within tenant admin — code strings, discount config), operational identifiers (redemption customer_id, applied_to_id), financial records (discount_amount_cents + final_amount_cents on every redemption — 7y financial retention), marketing-adjacent metadata (issuance_context tagging referral / campaign), and per-customer usage counters. No health / medical / minor-specific data on any row.

public: Coupon.code (customer-facing — printed on invoices, marketing collateral)
confidential: Coupon.discount_amount (tenant-competitive — competitors would benefit from seeing the exact reward table)
Coupon.usage_cap (campaign-size signal — competitors would infer the tenant's marketing budget)
CouponRedemption.source_amount_cents (pre-discount amount — reveals the customer's spend)
CouponRedemption.discount_snapshot (composite — frozen coupon config at redemption time)
regulated_financial: Coupon.discount_type + discount_amount + discount_currency (financial-audit alignment — 7 year retention)
CouponRedemption.source_amount_cents + discount_amount_cents + final_amount_cents (revenue-recognition impact — 7-year financial retention)
CouponRedemption.discount_snapshot (frozen config that was applied — audit-critical for post-hoc reconstruction)
audit_log: Coupon.discount_type + discount_amount + discount_currency (frozen after first redemption)
Coupon.usage_count (every increment — reconciled nightly for drift detection)

notes: Coupon.code is deliberately public — the whole point is customer-facing display. The confidential fields are the *terms* of the discount (amount + currency + caps) — competitors gaining access to a tenant's coupons list would learn campaign structure + budget shape.

CouponRedemption.discount_snapshot is a COMPOSITE — it freezes the coupon config at redemption time. Egress rendering routes through DiscountSnapshotBuilder's redactor to strip currency + amount fields when the caller lacks coupons.view-financials permission.
No PII on the Coupon row directly. CouponRedemption carries customer_id which is a FK — the underlying User/Athlete PII cascades through their own module's redaction on erasure.
regulated_financial fields align with 7-year retention. Extended to 10y with Enterprise `coupon_extended_retention`.
No PCI-DSS scope: NO card data / PAN / CVV on any owned row. Payment linkage flows through the Finance module (Wave 4) via applied_to_id -> Invoice/Transaction FK.
issuance_context on Coupon is CONFIDENTIAL because it may reveal referral program IDs + marketing campaign IDs to unauthorised readers. Only admin/owner can read it.
